channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Herro scores 30 points to lead Heat past Hawks 123-114 in OT in play-in and into NBA playoffs
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — After making NBA Play-In Tournament history by winning two road games, the Miami Heat won't be afraid of facing No. 1 seed Cleveland in the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Edman hits leadoff HR filling in for Ohtani and Yamamoto strikes out 10 as Dodgers beat Texas 3-0
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Yoshinobu Yamamoto matched his career high with 10 strikeouts over seven innings after Tommy Edman led off the game with a home run and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Texas Rangers 3-0 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inside the numbers: Led by Cleveland and Oklahoma City, it was the season of the streak in the NBA
item.description: It was the year of the long winning streak in the NBA. There were five instances of teams winning 11 or more games in a row — three by Cleveland, two by Oklahoma City, and it's probably no coincidence that those two teams are the ones that earned No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani absent from Dodgers for birth of first child
item.description: MLB superstar Shohei Ohtani is away from the LA Dodgers for the birth of his first child, manager Dave Roberts told reporters on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UNC employees 'not loving the Bill Belichick experience,' longtime Boston reporter says
item.description: It appears Bill Belichick is bringing his normal coaching style to UNC, and some employees aren't exactly thrilled about it, according to a report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani away from the Los Angeles Dodgers for birth of his first child
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Shohei Ohtani is away from the Los Angeles Dodgers for the birth of the two-way superstar's first child. Manager Dave Roberts said before the Dodgers' series opener Friday night in Texas that Ohtani was with his wife. Ohtani was placed on MLB's paternity list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Gregg Popovich has medical incident in restaurant, is resting at home, AP source says
item.description: San Antonio coach Gregg Popovich is doing well at home after needing medical attention earlier this week following an incident at a restaurant, a person with knowledge of the matter told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NHL sets another attendance record, topping 23 million fans for the 1st time
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NHL has set another attendance record and surpassed 23 million fans for the first time. The league on Friday reported an attendance figure of 23,014,458 over the 1,312-game regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees' Jazz Chisholm Jr. suspended 1 game following ejection, violation of social media policy
item.description: New York Yankees second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. was suspended for one game and fined by Major League Baseball on Friday following his ejection during a game at the Tampa Bay Rays and violation of MLB’s social media policy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Spurs coach Gregg Popovich has medical emergency while recovering from stroke: report
item.description: As he continues to recover from a stroke he had late last year, Gregg Popovich reportedly experienced a medical emergency that landed him in a hospital Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dallas Stars going into playoffs without injured top goal scorer Jason Robertson
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Stars will begin the playoffs without top goal scorer Jason Robertson, who suffered a lower-body injury in their last regular-season game, coach Pete DeBoer said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pistons are back in the playoffs and take NBA-record postseason losing streak into Game 1 vs Knicks
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York beating Detroit had become something of an NBA certainty, with the Knicks doing it 16 straight times over a span of five years. The Pistons finally ended that streak with three wins over the Knicks during their massive 2024-25 turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chisholm ejected for arguing called 3rd strike during Yankees' 6-3 win over Rays
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Jazz Chisholm Jr. was ejected from the New York Yankees' 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays on Thursday night, then appeared to violate Major League Baseball's social media policy when he posted in-game criticism online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yan Liu, Ashleigh Buhai share lead at 63 in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Yan Liu birdied the final three holes in chilly conditions Thursday afternoon for a 9-under 63 and a share of the first-round lead with Ashleigh Buhai in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Warriors-Rockets schedule for first-round playoff series
item.description: (KRON) -- They took the hard way in, but the Golden State Warriors are officially in the playoffs after securing a spot in Tuesday's nail-biting win over the Memphis Grizzlies. The No. 7 seed Dubs (48-34) will face the No. 2 seed Houston Rockets (52-30) in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Keller's four points leads Utah past Nashville, 7-3
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (ABC4 Sports) - With nothing to play for but pride, the Utah Hockey Club is out to finish the season strong.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hear from Masters champion Rory McIlroy and longtime friend Tony Finau
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) -- Rory McIlroy won the Masters yesterday to become the sixth player to complete the career Grand Slam. It was a long time coming for the Irishman -- and nobody was happier for him than Tony Finau, who has known McIlrory for a long time. "It's quite cool.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Crochet is still Crochet, even if Red now precedes 'Sox' on the front of his jersey
item.description: Garrett Crochet, the former White Sox pitcher, made his debut for the Boston Red Sox on Sunday, shutting down the Chicago White Sox with 11 strikeouts and one run. Despite the trade, Crochet has expressed his fondness for his former team and the memories he made on Chicago's South Side.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors' playoff seeding set after loss against Clippers in regular-season finale
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors' playoff path is set. They will play in the NBA Play-In Tournament following a home overtime loss to the Los Angeles Clippers in Sunday's regular-season finale. With the loss, the Warriors will face the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Thunder crush Jazz in home finale, 145-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz home finale was pretty representative of the entire season. The Jazz got blown out by the Oklahoma City Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
